name: Gainesville VA, USA

rent.notes: Prince William County, newer subdivisions (Heritage Hunt, Virginia Oaks). Cheaper than Fairfax but longer commute east.

groceries.notes: Wegmans, Harris Teeter, Giant. Roughly 10% below Fairfax-area pricing.

utilities.notes: NOVEC electric + Washington Gas + PWC Service Authority water/sewer + trash.

healthcare.notes: Same Medicare Part B + Medigap baseline as Fairfax. Novant UVA Health in Haymarket; Inova in Manassas.

healthcarePreMedicare.notes: ACA silver benchmark for 2-adult household both age ~60, before subsidies. County-level estimate (Prince William County, VA). PWC marketplace — similar to Fairfax with slightly more competition. Estimated ±15% vs healthcare.gov quote — verify for a specific ZIP before relying on the number.

petCare.notes: Suburban vet pricing, slightly below Fairfax.

transportation.notes: Car-dependent. I-66 HOV/toll lanes to DC. VRE Manassas line at Broad Run adds commuter option. Higher fuel use than Fairfax.

entertainment.notes: Verizon Fios 1Gig, streaming bundle, dining out (fewer restaurants than Fairfax).

phoneCell.notes: T-Mobile 55+ Essentials. Same plan as Fairfax.

miscellaneous.notes: HOA dues common in Gainesville subdivisions, EZ-Pass tolls, PWC vehicle decal.

medicalOOP.notes: Same retiree profile as Fairfax base; specialist availability slightly lower, may travel to Fairfax/DC.

taxes.notes: Income tax computed from VA brackets; stored value 0 by convention.

petDaycare.notes: Doggy daycare 2 days/week. PWC area, slightly below Fairfax.

stateIncomeTax.exemptions: Age 65+ deduction $12K/person. SS fully exempt from VA tax.

salesTax.notes: Prince William County 6% (4.3% state + 0.7% regional + 1% NOVA transit)

propertyTax.notes: Renters: no direct property tax. PWC vehicle personal property ~$3.70/$100 assessed — slightly below Fairfax.

taxes.notes: Same VA tax treatment as Fairfax. Lower PWC property tax rate offsets newer-car assessments.

healthcare.notes: Novant UVA Health System Prince William (Haymarket), Sentara Northern Virginia Medical Center. Inova Fair Oaks/Fairfax ~25 min for specialty care.

acaMarketplace.notes: PWC marketplace — similar to Fairfax with slightly more competition.
acaMarketplace.disclaimer: Estimated ±15% vs healthcare.gov quote — verify for a specific ZIP before relying on the number.

lifestyle.notes: Bull Run Mountains, Manassas Battlefield nearby. Quieter than inner-NOVA; suburban family feel.

pros: Same VA tax treatment (SS exempt, retiree deductions)
VRE commuter rail to DC available
Access to Bull Run Mountains and wineries
cons: Longer commute to DC / inner NOVA
Fewer restaurants and cultural amenities than Fairfax
Specialty healthcare may require drive to Fairfax/DC
